title: 3/4 Inch Hose Connectors, 6 x Thread Water Tap Hose Adapter 3/4 Inch Male Hose Pipe Connector Adapter for Irrigation Devices with Internal Thread 26.5mm (G3/4")
features: Made of high quality ABS plastic
Can be used to convert a plug into a socket
Replacement connector for guns, lances, sprinklers and other accessories, 3/4 inch external thread BSP with external thread, compatible with Hozelock and GARDENA hose fittings
PACKAGE INCLUDES - 6 x 3/4 inch external thread adapters and 6 x O-rings (16 mm) and 6 x 1/2 inch washers and 6 x 3/4 inch washers
description: Package includes: 6 x Topways 3/4 inch external thread adapters. 6 x O-rings (16mm) 6 x 1/2" (19mm) washers. 6 x 3/4 inch washers.
